title: Implement iceberg metadata cache for using last modify time
description:
### Company or project name
eBay
### Use case
using same query re-create one table
```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS demo.nyc.taxis
(
vendor_id bigint,
trip_id bigint,
trip_distance float,
fare_amount double,
store_and_fwd_flag string
)
USING iceberg TBLPROPERTIES ('format-version' = '2','write.update.mode'='merge-on-read','write.delete.mode'='merge-on-read','write.merge.mode'='merge-on-read')
PARTITIONED BY (vendor_id);
```
## Write Data to a Table
```sql
INSERT INTO demo.nyc.taxis
VALUES (1, 1000371, 1.8, 15.32, 'N'), (2, 1000372, 2.5, 22.15, 'N'), (2, 1000373, 0.9, 9.01, 'N'), (1, 1000374, 8.4, 42.13, 'Y');
INSERT INTO demo.nyc.taxis
VALUES (11, 1000371, 1.8, 15.32, 'N'), (12, 1000372, 2.5, 22.15, 'N'), (12, 1000373, 0.9, 9.01, 'N'), (11, 1000374, 8.4, 42.13, 'Y');
```
will generate same meta file name `vxxx.metadata.json`
if the cache is only path ` hdfs://hubble-lvs/workspaces/xxx/table_name/metadata/v3.metadata.json` this will  lead **_cache inconsistency occurs_**
### Describe the solution you'd like
build cache key with last modify time.
### Describe alternatives you've considered
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS demo.nyc.taxis_v2 (vendor_id BIGINT, trip_id BIGINT, trip_distance FLOAT, fare_amount DOUBLE, store_and_fwd_flag VARCHAR(255)) PARTITION BY vendor_id;
SELECT vendor_id, SUM(fare_amount) AS total_fare FROM demo.nyc.taxis_v2 GROUP BY vendor_id HAVING total_fare > 20.00;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS demo.nyc.taxis_summary AS SELECT vendor_id, COUNT(*) AS trip_count, AVG(fare_amount) AS avg_fare FROM demo.nyc.taxis_v2 GROUP BY vendor_id;
key_bug_features: Cache inconsistency due to duplicate metadata file names
